name: Mian & Bao
tagline: Soup dumplings and Sichuan noodles at Ward Village — James Beard semi-finalist Chef Tony Xu bridges Shanghai and Chengdu.
mustOrder: xiao long bao — soup dumplings, the star of the menu
sheng jian bao — pan-fried pork buns with crispy bottoms
chili oil wontons — numbing, spicy, addictive
talkStory: Chef Tony Xu (James Beard semi-finalist) brings serious Shanghai and Sichuan cooking to Ward Village. The xiao long bao are the draw — delicate wrappers filled with hot soup and pork. The sheng jian bao (pan-fried buns) have a crispy bottom that shatters into soupy filling. Also offers a daily yum cha dim sum tea service. If you've been to Din Tai Fung on the mainland and wished Honolulu had something comparable, this is your spot. Lunch and dinner.
